title: Sakura Totem Particles
description: Pink Flowers instead of the boring old Green and Yellow totem particles. Why not Aestheticize cheating death?!
body:
Tired of the **BORING** totem particles ?! Want your game to look_ pretty_?! Try this pack. Turns all totem particles into a **pretty Sakura Flower**! 
     - This pack requires Optifine, Lunar Particle Changer or Custom Totem Particles.
- Increment from author - (6/26/2025)
- hello?! 2000 Downloads! This is genuinely a milestone I never thought I would reach, Thank you all! :3
- More cute pink projects on the way, Thanks for all the support!
